name: ai-chat
title: AI Chat
description: State-free assistant shell with header, visible context, transcript, suggestions, and composer slots.

props.name: variant
props.description: `plain` drops the card chrome for a full-page workspace or a sheet body.

props.name: context
props.description: Visible scope of the conversation — typically ai-context-bar.

props.name: suggestions
props.description: Prompt chips or suggestion cards between transcript and composer.

props.name: composer
props.description: Typically ai-prompt-input, optionally above a disclaimer.

clinicalNotes: Context is a slot, not internal state. That is deliberate: a clinician must be able to see which patient, encounter, and date range a question will carry before they ask it, and a shell that stored context privately would make that invisible. The component holds no conversation state either, so the same shell can host a floating sheet and a full-page workspace without a second implementation drifting out of sync.
notes: Give the shell a bounded height (h-[32rem], or h-full in a sheet) so the transcript region can scroll instead of the page.
